name: Arb Corporation Limited.
analysis: ARB's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.0700, stop A$17.8299, target A$21.0900 (1.63:1) — then trail it.
